6 min read
Just now

--

Non-member ? click here to read.
If you’ve followed this series so far, you’ve already learned:
✅ What React is and why it was created.
✅ How to set up a modern React development environment.
✅ How JSX lets us describe user interfaces in a clean and expressive way.
Now it’s time to learn the concept that truly defines React.
Components.
If JSX is the language React uses to describe the UI, then Components are the building blocks that make large applications possible.
Before we write a single line of code, let’s understand why Components exist.
A Story Every Frontend Developer Can Relate To
Imagine it’s your first day at a startup.
Your manager walks over and says,
“We need the homepage ready by Friday.”
You open the design in Figma.
The page contains:

• A Navigation Bar

• A Hero Banner

• A Search Section

• Featured Products

• Customer Reviews
